content:
Thought: I need to search on Google "How long does it take to visit the National Palace Museum?".
Action: Type [7]; How long does it take to visit the National Palace Museum?

Observation: please analyze the attached screenshot and give the Thought and Action. I've provided the tag name of each element and the text it contains (if text exists). Note that <textarea> or <input> may be textbox, but not exactly. Please focus more on the screenshot and then refer to the textual information.
[1]: <textarea> "How long does it take to visit the National Palace Museum?", "搜尋";	[6]: <button> "搜尋";	[7]: "快速設定", "設定";	[9]: "登入";	[10]: "全部";	[11]: "圖片";	[12]: "新聞";	[13]: "購物";	[14]: "短片";	[15]: "影片";	[16]: "地圖";	[17]: "更多";	[18]: "工具";	[19]: "National Palace Museum (2025) - All You Need to Know ...Tripadvisorhttps://www.tripadvisor.com › ... › Things to Do in Shilin";	[22]: "關於精選摘要";	[24]: "意見回饋";	[26]: "Is the National Palace Museum Taipei worth visiting?";	[27]: "How long does it take to visit the National Gallery?";	[28]: "What to do around the National Palace Museum?";	[29]: "How long does it take to go through a museum?";	[30]: "意見回饋";	[31]: "How long does it usually take to visit the museum?Tripadvisorhttps://www.tripadvisor.com › FAQ_A...";	[32]: "翻譯這個網頁";

Thought: According to the search results, the museum brochure suggests a 60-minute to 90-minute plan. Also, a TripAdvisor user mentioned spending 4 hours there.
Action: ANSWER; The museum brochure suggests a 60-minute to 90-minute plan. A TripAdvisor user mentioned spending 4 hours there.
